calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-10-2011 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-10-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 514 Judge: Ellen Chaitin; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; Not Reported.

Daniel Bornstein, Esq. for Plaintiff Bernstein Realty, Inc.
Aaron Farmer, Esq. through limited scope, representing the Defendants Sonia Ramos, Julio Ramos and Alfredo Ramos.

The Judge Pro Tem: Mark Schreiber litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 503B, for settlement discussions.
Case settled, the trial date vacated.
Stipulation for entry of future judgment, filed in open court.
